message:
feat(core): implement SetMetadata overlay modification

The SetMetadata overlay modification was previously a no-op that only
logged the change without actually modifying the skill spec. This
commit implements the actual metadata updates:

Supported metadata keys:
- "author": Sets spec.metadata.author
- "license": Sets spec.metadata.license
- "version": Sets spec.metadata.version
- "name": Sets spec.metadata.name
- "description": Sets spec.metadata.description

Unknown keys are silently ignored (still logged in changes) to allow
forward compatibility with future metadata fields.

Added test coverage verifying:
- Known keys actually update the spec
- Unknown keys don't cause errors
- Changes are properly recorded in the result

This enables overlays to fully customize skill metadata based on
runtime context (environment, user settings, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
